title: Select time for Form "Schedule a close date"
excerpt: Currently any forms with a scheduled close date are in UTC time zone, and you cannot adjust this or add a time to close. Please update the system to allow a close time to be selected, and for the time zone to match the t…

posts.author: sharmaro (Robin S)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently any forms with a scheduled close date are in UTC time zone, and you cannot adjust this or add a time to close. Please update the system to allow a close time to be selected, and for the time zone to match the time zone my account is set to. This used to be a feature of Monday.com before the update last year.

posts.author: cdc-ams (Ms. Mathville)
posts.cookedHtml:
This came as a surprise to us, and caused a total disaster and so much extra work!

Who uses UTC?
